w:r.w:t: The database mirrors Dialpad's company hierarchy and adds application-specific tables for read tracking, notifications, and user management.
Application login accounts (super admin + invited users)
Offices under the company — synced from Dialpad
Live agent availability status (Available, Busy, DND, Offline)
External contacts (customers) who communicate with the company
All SMS messages: inbound, outbound, internal agent-to-agent
Groups messages into conversations between parties
Tracks which app users read which messages — WhatsApp-style seen
All call records: inbound, outbound, missed, voicemail
In-app notifications independent of Dialpad seen status
Raw webhook event log for debugging and audit
Admin action history (user added, deleted, password changed)
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
must_change_password BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
must_change_password: set TRUE on creation, set FALSE after first password change
password_hash: bcrypt hash, never store plain text
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
office_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES offices(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
department_id UUID REFERENCES departments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
office_id UUID REFERENCES offices(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
agent_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES agents(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
-- One row per agent, upserted on every status webhook event
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_agent_status_agent_id ON agent_status(agent_id);
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
customer_id UUID REFERENCES customers(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
department_id UUID REFERENCES departments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
agent_a_id UUID REFERENCES agents(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
agent_b_id UUID REFERENCES agents(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
CREATE INDEX idx_threads_last_message ON message_threads(last_message_at DESC);
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
thread_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES message_threads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
sender_agent_id UUID REFERENCES agents(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
sender_customer_id UUID REFERENCES customers(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
is_internal BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
CREATE INDEX idx_messages_sent_at ON messages(sent_at DESC);
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
message_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES messages(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
reader_user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
read_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
-- Prevent duplicate read entries for same user + message
When a user opens a conversation in YOUR app, a POST to /api/messages/read/:messageId is called
This inserts a row: which user read which message, at what time
To show "Seen by" info: JOIN message_read_log with users on reader_user_id
This is 100% independent of Dialpad — Dialpad's seen status is never used
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
agent_id UUID REFERENCES agents(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
customer_id UUID REFERENCES customers(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
department_id UUID REFERENCES departments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
CREATE INDEX idx_calls_started_at ON calls(started_at DESC);
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
thread_id UUID REFERENCES message_threads(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
call_id UUID REFERENCES calls(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
is_read BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
CREATE INDEX idx_notifications_created_at ON notifications(created_at DESC);
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
processed BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
received_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
CREATE INDEX idx_webhook_events_received ON webhook_events(received_at DESC);
Every webhook received is saved here first — even before processing. If processing fails, error_message is populated. This allows replaying failed events.
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
performed_by UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
performed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_log_performed_at ON audit_log(performed_at DESC);
Get all messages in a thread with read info:
) FILTER (WHERE rl.id IS NOT NULL) AS read_by
LEFT JOIN agents a ON m.sender_agent_id = a.id
LEFT JOIN customers c ON m.sender_customer_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN message_read_log rl ON rl.message_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON rl.reader_user_id = u.id
GROUP BY m.id, a.name, c.name, c.phone_number
Get all customers an agent interacted with (Messages tab):
JOIN customers c ON t.customer_id = c.id
JOIN messages m ON m.thread_id = t.id
